## PAIRED COLUMN chart, TELOS style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-MAG-02",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "magnitude",
    "comparison"
  ],
  "form": "two columns per category, side by side",
  "data_required": "ordered categories + exactly two comparable series (budget vs actual)",
  "family": "MAG",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-DST-02 (dots when columns crowd)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "more than two series",
      "use": "CH-TIM-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- two measures per category: budget vs actual, plan vs forecast
- 6 categories or fewer

Do NOT use when:
- more than two series (unreadable; use lines or small multiples)
- long category names (use CH-DST-02)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title naming the widest gap",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on first value label",
  "x": "ordered category labels",
  "series": "exactly two: [{name, values}, {name, values}]; second is the key"
}
```


### Rules
- series named by direct labels above the first pair, never a legend
- series_a muted (reference), series_b primary (actual/key)
- bars start at zero
- unit once

### Never do this
- three or more series per group
- legends
- truncated baseline

### QA before delivering
- [ ] exactly two series
- [ ] labels above first pair
- [ ] baseline at zero
- [ ] unit once
- [ ] source present

| background | `#FFFFFF` |

| x_label | `#444444` |
| baseline | `#D9D6D2` |
| title | `#1A1A1A` |
| source | `#444444` |

### Fonts

- Title font: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 700
- All other text: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
